story: Paper is a thin material produced by pressing together moist fibres of cellulose pulp derived from wood, rags or grasses, and drying them into flexible sheets. It is a versatile material with many uses, including writing, printing, packaging, cleaning, and a number of industrial and construction processes.
q1: Paper is made by pressing moist cellulose fibers together and then heating them to form rigid sheets. (True/False?)
